RURIMEGU-KAHO_DEFEND.title: Defend
RURIMEGU-KAHO_STRIKE.title: Strike
RURIMEGU-WIDE_HEART.title: Wide Heart
RURIMEGU-BLOOMING_HEART.title: Blooming Heart
RURIMEGU-BLOOMING_HEART.description: Increase Max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. They each cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less next time they are played.
RURIMEGU-TRAGIC_NIGHT_FIREWORKS.title: Tragic Night Fireworks
RURIMEGU-TRAGIC_NIGHT_FIREWORKS.descript: Set your Max ❤️ to 99, but you can no longer increase Max ❤️. At the end of combat, increase your Max HP by {IfUpgraded:show:twice |}the highest single increase to your Max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-LINKURA_ENERGY.title: Linkura Energy
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_THANKS.title: Special Thanks
RURIMEGU-A_THOUSAND_CHANGES.title: A Thousand Changes
RURIMEGU-A_THOUSAND_CHANGES.description: This turn, your ❤️ overflow is converted to an equal amount of Max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-SUMMERY_PAIN.title: Summery Pain
RURIMEGU-SUMMERY_PAIN.description: Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold] and draw that many cards. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: Whenever you have fewer than {RURIMEGU-HAND_THRESHOLD:diff()} cards in [gold]Hand[/gold], draw cards until you have {RURIMEGU-HAND_THRESHOLD:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-PRESENT_PAST_FUTURE.title: Present, Past, Future
RURIMEGU-PRESENT_PAST_FUTURE.description: Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold] and draw that many cards. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: Trigger this card's effect for every {RURIMEGU-PPF_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} ❤️ you [gold]Collect[/gold]. (Current: {RURIMEGU-PPF_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-IS_THAT_CLOUD_A_WHALE.title: Is That Cloud A Whale?
RURIMEGU-IS_THAT_CLOUD_A_WHALE.descripti: Gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold] for every {RURIMEGU-MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} Max ❤️ you have. Reset Max ❤️ to 9.
RURIMEGU-EXCESSIVE_TRAINING.title: Excessive Training
RURIMEGU-EXCESSIVE_TRAINING.description: Reduce your Max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} up to {RURIMEGU-MAX_TIMES:diff()} {RURIMEGU-MAX_TIMES:plural:time|times}. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each reduction.
RURIMEGU-ENDURING_TRADITION.title: Enduring Tradition
RURIMEGU-ENDURING_TRADITION.description: Until the end of turn, whenever your Max ❤️ increases, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] that many times and [gold]Collect[/gold] instead.
RURIMEGU-TWO_SECONDS_OF_ETERNITY.title: Two Seconds Of Eternity
RURIMEGU-TWO_SECONDS_OF_ETERNITY.descrip: Play all other cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. This card's cost equals their total cost.
RURIMEGU-BALL_OF_TRAILS.title: Ball of Trails
RURIMEGU-BALL_OF_TRAILS.description: [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. If drawn at the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and discard your [gold]Hand[/gold], then draw that many cards.
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_THANKS.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play an Attack, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-BUDDING_PREMONITION.title: Budding Premonition
RURIMEGU-BUDDING_PREMONITION.description: Increase Max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. Deal damage equal to your current Max ❤️ to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-POCHI.title: Pochi!
RURIMEGU-POCHI.description: Deal damage equal to your current ❤️. [gold]Collect[/gold].
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_OUTCOMES.title: Training Outcomes
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_OUTCOMES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], this card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less in this combat.
RURIMEGU-KAHO_SMASH.title: Kaho Smash
RURIMEGU-FANTASY375.title: 37.5°C's Fantasy
RURIMEGU-FANTASY375.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Your next Power card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
RURIMEGU-STEP_UP.title: Step Up!
RURIMEGU-STEP_UP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times. Increase Max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_PYON_PYON.title: Bunny Pyon Pyon
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_PYON_PYON.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Burst[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
RURIMEGU-CERISE_BOUQUET.title: Cerise Bouquet
RURIMEGU-CERISE_BOUQUET.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 3 times.
RURIMEGU-SPRING_BREEZE_SWING.title: Spring Breeze Swing
RURIMEGU-SPRING_BREEZE_SWING.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever [gold]Burst[/gold] reaches your ❤️ limit, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_DEFEND.title: Bunny Defend
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_DEFEND.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current Max ❤️.
RURIMEGU-GENYOU_YAKOU.title: Genyou Yakou
RURIMEGU-GENYOU_YAKOU.description: If you have 6 or fewer ❤️, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
RURIMEGU-ZANYOU.title: Zanyou
RURIMEGU-NEW_BLACK.title: Nεw Black
RURIMEGU-CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
RURIMEGU-FULL_OF_POWER.title: Full Of Power
RURIMEGU-AGILE_STEPS.title: Agile Steps
RURIMEGU-AGILE_STEPS.description: [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. Your next Attack card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
RURIMEGU-LOVE_IT.title: Love it!
RURIMEGU-MIX_SHAKE.title: Mix shake!!
RURIMEGU-MIX_SHAKE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Triggers once more for every 6 ❤️ you have.
RURIMEGU-FAN_SERVICE.title: Fan Service
RURIMEGU-FAN_SERVICE.description: [gold]Collect[/gold]. This [gold]Collect[/gold] deals damage to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-GLOWING_ROUTINE.title: Glowing Routine
RURIMEGU-GLOWING_ROUTINE.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-UNFULFILLED_WISHES.title: Unfulfilled Wishes
RURIMEGU-UNFULFILLED_WISHES.description: Deal damage equal to the difference between your Max ❤️ and current ❤️. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current ❤️.
RURIMEGU-VARIATIONS.title: Variations
RURIMEGU-VARIATIONS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever your Max ❤️ changes, this card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less next time it is played.
RURIMEGU-AFTERGLOW.title: Afterglow
RURIMEGU-AFTERGLOW.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], return this card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RURIMEGU-BUILD_UP.title: Build-up
RURIMEGU-BUILD_UP.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw {BUILD_UP_DRAW:diff()} {BUILD_UP_DRAW:plural:card|cards}. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: for every 3 times you [gold]Burst[/gold], draw 1 extra card the next time you play this card. (Current: {BUILD_UP_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-SUDDEN_INSPIRATION.title: Sudden Inspiration
RURIMEGU-FULL_BLOOM_SPRINT.title: Full Bloom Sprint
RURIMEGU-FULL_BLOOM_SPRINT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If your ❤️ count is less than half your Max ❤️, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
RURIMEGU-EPHEMERAL_YOUTH.title: Ephemeral Youth
RURIMEGU-EPHEMERAL_YOUTH.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play a card, reduce this card's damage by 4 this turn.
RURIMEGU-HEART_STRIKE.title: Heart Strike
RURIMEGU-HEART_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Increase Max ❤️ by unblocked damage dealt.
RURIMEGU-BACKSTAGE_PREPARATION.title: Backstage Preparation
RURIMEGU-BACKSTAGE_PREPARATION.descripti: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Your next [gold]Backstage[/gold] card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
RURIMEGU-OVERFLOWING_EMOTION.title: Overflowing Emotion
RURIMEGU-OVERFLOWING_EMOTION.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], permanently increase this card's damage by {OVERFLOWING_EMOTION_GROWTH:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-SRK.title: S.R.K.
RURIMEGU-SRK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Increase Max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
RURIMEGU-EMBRACING_PETALS.title: Embracing Petals
RURIMEGU-EMBRACING_PETALS.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] amount to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], gain {RURIMEGU-AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] and discard this card.
RURIMEGU-SAYO_SHIGURE.title: Sayo-Shigure
RURIMEGU-SAYO_SHIGURE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold] 9, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}. (Current: {SAYO_SHIGURE_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-MYSTERY_AT_THE_LIBRARY.title: Mystery at the Library
RURIMEGU-MYSTERY_AT_THE_LIBRARY.descript: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play a Skill, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-DREAM_BELIEVERS.title: Dream Believers
RURIMEGU-AURORA_FLOWER.title: Aurora Flower
RURIMEGU-ON_YOUR_MARK.title: On Your Mark
RURIMEGU-ON_YOUR_MARK.description: Increase Max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}X. When drawn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to {Block:diff()}x your current Energy.
RURIMEGU-SOULMATE.title: Soulmate
RURIMEGU-MENTAL_GUARD.title: Mental Guard
RURIMEGU-MENTAL_GUARD.description: This turn, your [gold]Burst[/gold] no longer grants ❤️, but grants an equal amount of [gold]Block[/gold] instead.
RURIMEGU-HALF_CONVEYED_FEELINGS.title: Half-Conveyed Feelings
RURIMEGU-FALL_BACK_ASLEEP.title: Fall Back Asleep
RURIMEGU-FALL_BACK_ASLEEP.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current ❤️. [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the end of this turn.
RURIMEGU-ENCORE.title: Encore
RURIMEGU-ENCORE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for every [gold]Burst[/gold] triggered this turn. (Current: {ENCORE_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-CELEBRATION.title: Celebration!
RURIMEGU-TRUE_FACE_PIXEL.title: True Face Pixel
RURIMEGU-TRUE_FACE_PIXEL.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. Add them to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RURIMEGU-TRUE_FACE_PIXEL.selectionScreen: Choose up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RURIMEGU-FULL_BLOOM.title: Full Bloom!
RURIMEGU-FULL_BLOOM.description: If your ❤️ is at max, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. [gold]Collect[/gold].
RURIMEGU-CHOREOGRAPHY_MEMO.title: Choreography Memo
RURIMEGU-CHOREOGRAPHY_MEMO.description: [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()} a total of {Repeat:diff()} times. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: every {CHOREOGRAPHY_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} times you [gold]Burst[/gold], [gold]Collect[/gold]. (Current: {CHOREOGRAPHY_TRACKER})
RURIMEGU-LINK_TO_THE_FUTURE.title: Link to the FUTURE
RURIMEGU-LINK_TO_THE_FUTURE.description: Retain your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn. Next turn gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
RURIMEGU-SUKI_SUKI_CLUB.title: Suki Suki Club
RURIMEGU-SUKI_SUKI_CLUB.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. When drawn, increase Max ❤️ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-SECTION_CHANGE.title: Section Change
RURIMEGU-SECTION_CHANGE.description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Collect[/gold].
RURIMEGU-SUGAR_MELT.title: Sugar Melt
RURIMEGU-SUGAR_MELT.description: Gain {RURIMEGU-AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold]. Whenever you [gold]Auto Burst[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_APPEAL.title: Special Appeal
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_APPEAL.description: Your [gold]Collect[/gold] deals damage to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-UNADORNED_BEAUTY.title: Unadorned Beauty
RURIMEGU-UNADORNED_BEAUTY.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. You can no longer increase your ❤️ limit.
RURIMEGU-AUTO_COLLECT_ON.title: Auto Collect: On
RURIMEGU-HOLIDAY_HOLIDAY.title: Holiday∞Holiday
RURIMEGU-WELCOME_ISHIKAWA.title: Welcome! Ishikawa
RURIMEGU-WELCOME_ISHIKAWA.description: At the start of your turn, choose at most {Cards:diff()} [gold]Backstage[/gold] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_CAMP.title: Training Camp
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_CAMP.description: The first {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Backstage[/gold] cards you play each turn cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less.
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY.title: Career Survey
RURIMEGU-CAREER_SURVEY.description: At the start of your turn, convert ❤️ to equal [gold]Block[/gold].
RURIMEGU-AUTO_CLICKER_ON.title: Auto Clicker: On
RURIMEGU-AUTO_CLICKER_ON.description: Whenever you [gold]Burst[/gold], [gold]Collect[/gold]. ALL enemies and newly appearing enemies gain 99 [gold]Intangible[/gold].
RURIMEGU-FLOWER_KNOT.title: Flower Knot
RURIMEGU-FLOWER_KNOT.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Backstage[/gold] effect, discard that [gold]Backstage[/gold] card and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
RURIMEGU-REFLECTION_IN_THE_MIRROR.title: Reflection in the Mirror
RURIMEGU-REFLECTION_IN_THE_MIRROR.descri: Effects that increase your Max ❤️ trigger twice.
RURIMEGU-PROLOGUE.title: Prologue
RURIMEGU-PROLOGUE.description: Whenever your Max ❤️ changes, your next card costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less this turn.
RURIMEGU-MAY_DREAMS_BLOOM.title: May Dreams Bloom
RURIMEGU-MAY_DREAMS_BLOOM.description: For every {RURIMEGU-MAX_HEARTS_THRESHOLD:inverseDiff()} ❤️ overflowed, gain 1 stack of [gold]Auto Burst[/gold]. Does not count overflow from [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
RURIMEGU-BLOOM_GARDEN_PARTY.title: Bloom Garden Party
RURIMEGU-BLOOM_GARDEN_PARTY.description: Your [gold]Backstage[/gold] effects can also trigger from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
RURIMEGU-HAPPY_SUPREMACY.title: Happy Supremacy!
RURIMEGU-HAPPY_SUPREMACY.description: Convert all your ❤️ to [gold]Strength[/gold] or [gold]Dexterity[/gold], randomly distributed to ALL {IfUpgraded:show:players|players and enemies}.
RURIMEGU-HINOSHITA_INSTALL.title: Hinoshita Install
RURIMEGU-HINOSHITA_INSTALL.description: When another player plays a card, it also triggers your [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
